description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade features a driveway leading to a two-car garage, a small landscaped yard, and a main entrance set back from the street. The property is enclosed by a low perimeter wall, with several trees and shrubs providing greenery around the house. The rear of the house includes a private patio area with outdoor seating, partially shielded by the wall for privacy. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with larger panes facing the backyard and smaller, more private windows on the sides. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, two-car garage, and enclosed yard, featuring clean lines and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two-car garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long perimeter wall, side windows, and additional greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private patio area, large backyard windows, and enclosed yard.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the patio, side wall, and a mix of windows and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a small paved path, no porch, minimal overhang, and simple landscaping.
